We could use session.focus on a specific symbol? Not sure.

Better: Use graph.find to locate the symbol definition (maybe node id S18). Then use session.expand_file on the file containing it (F1) with limit to that symbol? Might need to use session.expand_file with depth to get content of that area.

Alternatively, use session.read? Not listed.

Thus tool call: session.expand_file with payload {"target":"symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::RUN_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION"} maybe with depth=0? Use default fields.

We need to produce JSON with kind:tool_call, tool_call.tool_name:"session.expand_file@v1", payload with target.

Also need to include acquired_fact_ids: list of fact ids we acquire? Not yet; maybe after tool_result we will have facts. But we need to return JSON now?
